name: Joe List
bio: Joe List is an American stand-up comedian and actor from Massachusetts who built his name as a fixture at the Comedy Cellar and on the podcast Tuesdays with Stories with Mark Normand. His confessional, anxiety-driven material has appeared on Conan, Letterman, and the Netflix series The Standups, and he has self-released a string of hour-long specials on YouTube. He toured arenas opening for Louis C.K. and later co-wrote and starred in the film Fourth of July.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up in Boston after high school
Launches Tuesdays with Stories podcast with Mark Normand
Finalist on NBC's Last Comic Standing; Comedy Central half-hour
Half-hour set on Netflix's The Standups
Releases special I Hate Myself on Comedy Central's YouTube
Co-writes and stars in the film Fourth of July

accolades: Opened arena dates for Louis C.K., including Madison Square Garden
Regular at the Comedy Cellar in New York City

bits.yt_title: Women Don't Need a Wingman | Joe List | Stand Up Comedy
